invalidModelYears.reason: PT Cruiser production started February 2000 for 2001 model year. No 2000 MY exists.
First-gen Pacifica ended 2008, second-gen started 2017. No 2016 MY exists.
Caliber production started 2006 for 2007 model year. No 2006 MY exists.
Modern Charger (LX platform) started 2006 model year. No 2005 MY for sedan.
Modern Dart (PF) started 2013 model year. 2012 were only pre-production pilot cars.

vehicles.notes: Mercedes SLK platform. Hub bore matches Mercedes spec (66.6mm).
SRT-6 added supercharged engine. All trims staggered.
SRT-6 discontinued. Limited US imports this year.
Last full production year. Production ended Dec 2007.
Final model year. Very limited production - mostly leftover 2007 builds sold as 2008.
First-gen Pacifica crossover. Shares platform with Dodge Caravan.
Four trim levels added this year.
3.8L V6 engine discontinued.
Side curtain airbags, ESC now standard.
Final year for first-gen Pacifica. LX trim added.

vehicles.reason: No 2016 model year exists. First-gen ended 2008, second-gen started 2017.
Production started Feb 2000 for 2001 model year. No 2000 MY exists in US market.

vehicles.notes: First model year. Extremely popular at launch.
Turbo GT trim added with 215hp.
Convertible variant introduced.
Mid-cycle refresh with updated styling.
Last year for turbo engine.
Turbo and convertible discontinued.
Final model year. Only Classic trim available.
End of second generation. Coupe uses 5x114.3, sedan/convertible use 5x100.
Third generation. Coupe on Mitsubishi Eclipse platform (5x114.3), sedan/convertible on JR platform (5x100).
Last year for Coupe.
Fourth generation. All models now 5x114.3. Complete redesign.
Final model year. Replaced by Chrysler 200.
Third generation end. 2001 was fourth gen redesign.
Fourth generation on RS platform.
Stow 'n Go seating introduced.
Last year of fourth gen.
Fifth generation. Bolt pattern changed to 5x127.
Final model year. Replaced by Chrysler Pacifica minivan in 2017.
First model year for Journey.
Facelift with new front end and 3.6L Pentastar V6.
Final model year for Journey.

vehicles.reason: Caliber production started 2006 for 2007 model year. No 2006 MY exists.
Modern Charger (LX platform) started 2006 model year. 2005 Charger sedan does not exist.
Modern Dart (PF platform) started 2013 model year. 2012 were only pre-production pilot vehicles.

vehicles.notes: First model year for modern Dart. Alfa Romeo Giulietta platform.
Final model year for Dart. Discontinued due to poor sales.
Second generation (SR II). Note: DodgeForum says 6x114.3 - needs verification.
ABS added as standard this year.
Last year of second generation. Final Edition models produced.
Third generation (ZB). Renamed to SRT-10. Complete redesign.
Coupe variant added.
